message:
test(wave-53): pure data-type coverage for compression, span, hash ring, fs metadata

Add 9 tests exercising Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq derives:
- trace/compression: Level, CompressedTrace
- trace/distributed/span: SymbolSpanStatus, SymbolSpanKind, SymbolSpan
- distributed/consistent_hash: HashRing
- fs/metadata: Metadata, FileType, Permissions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
